chapter: Chapter: When People Rebel – 1857 and After

questions.question: In which year did the Revolt of 1857 begin?
Where did the Revolt of 1857 start?
Who were the Indian soldiers in the British army called?
Who was the last Mughal emperor during the revolt?
Which city became the main centre of the revolt?
Who led the revolt in Jhansi?
Who led the revolt in Kanpur?
Who led the revolt in Bihar?
Who led the revolt in Lucknow?
Which sepoy is associated with the beginning of the revolt?
What was one immediate cause of the revolt?
Why were the cartridges controversial?
questions.answer: They were believed to be greased with cow and pig fat.

questions.question: Which policy allowed the British to annex Indian states without heirs?
Which company ruled India before 1858?
What happened to the East India Company after the revolt?
Who took direct control of India after 1858?
What was another name for the Revolt of 1857?
Which groups joined the revolt besides sepoys?
What happened to Bahadur Shah Zafar after the revolt?
Why did many Indian rulers join the revolt?
questions.answer: They were unhappy with British annexation policies.

questions.question: Which place was the Mughal capital during the revolt?
What type of uprising was the Revolt of 1857?
questions.answer: A large rebellion against British rule.

questions.question: Why did sepoys rebel against the British?
questions.answer: Due to unfair treatment and religious concerns.

questions.question: What did the revolt show about Indian resistance?
questions.answer: It showed strong opposition to British rule.

questions.question: Why is the Revolt of 1857 important in Indian history?
questions.answer: It was the first large-scale revolt against British rule.
